title: neottia australis
intro: Neottia australis, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit platelet aggregation and reduce inflammation, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as thrombosis and arthritis. The health benefits of Neottia australis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Neottia australis is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried extracts and decoctions.
